description_long: This car store is a single-story commercial building with a modern, minimalist design, featuring a prominent glass facade at the front that allows clear views into the showroom. The structure is surrounded by a paved parking lot with marked spaces, accommodating several cars of various colors and models, both parked and displayed. The building is flanked by well-maintained landscaping, including several large, leafy trees that provide shade and visual appeal. The entrance is centrally located, with a paved walkway leading directly to double glass doors, and the facade is accented by clean lines and neutral-colored exterior walls. On one side, there is an outdoor seating or waiting area with furniture, partially screened by trees. The rear and side elevations are more solid, with minimal fenestration, emphasizing the front-facing transparency and openness of the showroom.
description: A modern, single-story car store with a glass-fronted showroom, surrounded by a parking lot and landscaped with trees. The building features a central entrance, outdoor seating, and multiple cars displayed in front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glass facade, central entrance, and several cars parked in front, with trees flanking the building.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the solid back wall, parking lot, and trees, with minimal windows and no visible entrance.
description_view_2: Back/side view revealing an outdoor seating area, side wall, and a sign, with cars parked to the right.
description_view_3: Side view showing the parking lot, cars, and the building's glass front, with the entrance visible to the left.
attribute_signage: A rectangular sign is mounted on the right side of the building near the outdoor seating area, featuring bold text. No illuminated or digital signage is visible.
attribute_displayed_cars: Eight cars are visibly displayed in the parking lot, including sedans and hatchbacks in colors such as red, blue, green, gray, and black, arranged in two rows in front and to the side of the building.
attribute_glass_facade: Full-height glass panels form the entire front facade, providing a transparent view into the showroom and serving as the main architectural feature.
attribute_showroom_lighting: No interior lighting fixtures are clearly visible from the exterior views.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern minimalist, characterized by clean lines, a flat roof, extensive glass facade, and simple geometric forms.
